word: H5599 - סָפִיחַ - çâphîyach - saw-fee'-akh - Things as grow

sections.paragraph:
Original: ספיח

Transliteration: sâphı̂yach

Phonetic: saw-fee'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. outpouring
  2. growth from spilled kernels, after-growth, volunteer plants

Origin: from H5596

TWOT entry: 1533a,1533b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
